en.extract:
The equatorial akalat (Sheppardia aequatorialis) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.


Subspecies
S. a. acholiensis : Imatong Mountains
S. a. aequatorialis : eastern DRC, southern Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi and western Kenya.

The '''equatorial akalat''' ('''''Sheppardia aequatorialis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.

==Subspecies==
* ''S. a. acholiensis'' : [[Imatong Mountains]]
* ''S. a. aequatorialis'' : eastern [[Democratic Republic of the Congo|DRC]], southern [[Uganda]], [[Rwanda]], [[Burundi]] and western [[Kenya]].
